---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
<!-- What concrete pain does this solve? "I wish HarnessAI could ..." -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- Short description + which component(s) change (profile / skeleton / skill / gate / CLI). -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Competing approaches and why the proposal is preferred. -->

## Scope
<!--
- Breaking change? (yes / no)
- Migration cost for existing users?
- New LESSON or profile required?
-->

## Would you like to contribute the implementation?
<!-- Yes / No / Maybe — helpful for triage. -->
